title: oxystophyllum acianthum
intro: Oxystophyllum acianthum, also known as the Orchid tree, is a plant species in the Asclepiadaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxystophyllum acianthum include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and antipyretic agent. Herbal preparations of Oxystophyllum acianthum include making decoctions, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and flowers.
